name: validation-set-agent-bench-v1
description: Fixed agent/coding-style prompts for a reproducible local-vs-cloud head-to-head. The same prompts hit the local Ollama model and the cloud API so throughput, latency and cost are measured on identical work. Freeze this file once a video is recorded against it.

prompts.prompt: Write a single SQL query to find the top 3 customers by total order value in the last 90 days, given tables customers(id, name) and orders(id, customer_id, amount, created_at).

This JavaScript intermittently throws "cannot read property 'map' of undefined". List the 3 most likely causes and the one-line fix for each:

const rows = data.results.map(r => r.value);
Explain the difference between a process and a thread to a junior engineer in under 120 words, using one concrete analogy.
Draft a step-by-step plan to add token-bucket rate limiting to a REST API. Keep it to exactly 6 numbered steps.
